case_title: DANIEL LEYVA VS. JORGE MARTINEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-20-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-20-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST LERUE J. GRIM, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-20-2010 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-04-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEYVA, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JORGE MARTINEZ, SASHA C. MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-25-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-25-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance nor objection filed, the court ordered the case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
